title: HappyGhasts+
description: this plugin allow you to change the health and speed of the happy ghasts!
body:
this plugin allows you to change the speed and health of ghasts!

# **Commands**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/818bbe8ec2d7057186f4aec3b439de19718cac91.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/303b25ba110a97954129da8cb9aa5d44babcd437.png)


# **Features**
> ✅ Change Health
> 
> ✅ Change Speed
> 
> ✅ Heal With Ghast Tears
>
> ✅ Normal Speed With No Rider

# **Config**
```
speed: 1                  #Default: 1 (0.05 Speed)

health: 20                #Default: 20 (10 Hearts)

healamount: 5             #Amount ghast tears heal (Default 2.5 Hearts)
```
